raw_text: andrés zarabozo martínez ricardo villa 6, 6c, barcelona 08017 email: andres.zarabozo@gmail.com phone: (+34) 649 198 001 education aeronautical engineering. specialized in: aircraft design 2007 - 2013 etseiat, upc (polytechnic university of catalonia). senior school 2004 - 2007 newtown school, waterford, ireland. honor in the leaving certificate. primary and secondary school 1995 - 2004 école primaire and collége de bourg-madame, france. experience leam upc (acoustical and mechanical engineering laboratory) 2013 internship in the department of mechanics (upc) working in dynamic analyses for the construction of the new underground lines in sabadell and badalona. dynamic analyses performed using fem. academia ases 2010 teacher of calculus 1 for students of aeronautical engineering in academia ases located near the etseiat. important projects done during the studies final thesis: dynamic study of an excitation device. done using md nastran, patran, gid and matlab. participation in the etseiat contest sponsored by sener with: preliminary design of a low cost middle range aircraft. code for obtaining temperatures field of a space radiator using fem. code written in fortran. code for obtaining the flow properties in a divergent nozzle and heat transfer through the walls. code written in visual basic.net. skills languages fluent languages: spanish, english, french and catalan learning language: german (level a2) computer os: windows, linux (based on debian), osx office: microsoft office, libreoffice, latex programming: fortran, c++(with posix), visual basic.net, matlab (with simulink) other: gid (pre and post processor), md nastran, md patran, solid edge (cad), photoshop hobbies flight simulator, travelling, playing music (piano and flute), reading.
